RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0019 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Lena Silva Date of Birth: 09/02/1995 SSN (tokenized): TKN-459252 Annual Income: $165,000 Employer: Initech Loan Amount: $11,000 Term (months): 48 Branch: Berlin Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN62150AL BMW Sportage 2019 Hybrid Used 47,000 VIN21298AL Kia 320i 2019 EV New 12,000 Authorized Signature: Lena Silva
